history.text: Britain and France created the New Hebrides condominium.
The Santo rebellion was put down after independence.
Vanuatu joined the United Nations, confirming broad international recognition.

worthSeeing.title: Mount Yasur:
worthSeeing.text: One of the world's most accessible active volcanoes, on Tanna Island.

worthSeeing.title: Blue Hole:
worthSeeing.text: Crystal-clear blue holes and swimming spots across Espiritu Santo.

worthSeeing.title: SS President Coolidge:
worthSeeing.text: One of the world's greatest wreck dives, a luxury liner turned troop ship sunk in 1942.
